title: 3 Pcs Silver Spring Door Stop Set,Thickened Iron Metal Door Stops with Base Plate,Long Door Springs Screw with Anti-Slip Rubber for Walls and Doors
features: What you will get: The package contains 3 silver spring door stops, the size is 8.5cm*2.5cm, the quantity is sufficient and the style is novel, which can fully meet your daily needs and is convenient for your daily replacement.

PRODUCTS YOU CAN TRUST: We manufacture spring door stops from high-quality steel, which are extremely durable and wear-resistant, not easily deformed, and have a long service life, so you can buy and use them with confidence.

Safe and reliable: The spring door stop can be freely and flexibly bent 360 degrees, which can effectively relieve the impact force, prevent the door handle from hitting the wall, and there is no danger of tripping when the door is closed. It also avoids noise and allows you to live a comfortable life.

Good use effect: Our spring door stop has good toughness and can be bent flexibly. The loose base provides strong support for the spring, which can protect your wall from the marks of the door handle, and also prevent the door from hitting the wall or skirting board, allowing you to The door looks nice and elegant.

Easy to use: Our products are very simple and convenient to install, even if you are using it for the first time. Our spring door stop is surface mounted, no need to insert when using screws, you can choose to install it on the door or skirting board according to your needs.
